preReview.title: Houston Dynamo v Real Salt Lake: Olsen admits still work to do to regain scoring touch
preReview.description: Houston Dynamo are seeking a first win in MLS this season when they host Real Salt Lake at Shell Energy Stadium on Saturday.

QAData.question: Who won between Houston Dynamo FC and Real Salt Lake on Sun, 16 Mar 2025 00:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Real Salt Lake won 2–1 over Houston Dynamo FC on Sun, 16 Mar 2025 00:30:00 GMT.
